Where rivalries play out
Sign in

YOUR IDENTITY

How your rivals see you

Quick-set handicap from another source — paste your last 20

Have an official handicap from somewhere else? Paste your last 20 scores with course rating and slope. We compute your WHS index exactly the way the federation does.

Format — one per line:
85, 71.4, 132  (score, CR, slope)

ACCOUNT

Your account & data

Loading…
Danger zone

Deleting your profile clears all local data on this device. If you're signed in, you'll be asked to confirm before we delete your cloud data.

INSIGHTS · BUILDING YOUR GAME PROFILE

Fairway needs a few rounds to understand your game.

Once you start logging rounds, this page will reveal the patterns behind your golf:
where you play your best, when you perform under pressure, which conditions suit you, and what trends are shaping your progress.

Your stats won't just sit here.
They'll become your story.
EXAMPLE
You play best in the afternoon
Tee times after 2pm are 2.3 strokes better than your morning rounds.
EXAMPLE
Sunday is your gold day
Your best rounds come on Sundays — avg 4.1 strokes better.
EXAMPLE
You own Vestfold GK
Avg differential 12.4 over 8 rounds — your home course advantage.
EXAMPLE
You're in the zone right now
Last 5 rounds avg 81.2 — a full 4.3 better than overall.

Personal insight

Time of day — when do you play best?

Day of week

Sleep → score

Alcohol → score

Weather → score

Front 9 vs Back 9

Par 3 / 4 / 5 score mix

Scoring mix

Bounce-back rate

Share of par-or-better after a bogey-or-worse. Shows mental resilience.

Consistency score

Lower = more consistent rounds. Based on standard deviation of differentials.

Trend (rolling 3-month)

Season fingerprint

Clutch factor (last 3 holes)

Average score on holes 16-18 vs par. Requires hole-by-hole data.

Opening jitters (hole 1)

How much do you lose on the first hole on average?

Best and worst holes (all courses combined)

Every season you've ever played. Click any to enter the matchup.

Rivalry data 🏆

This round counts in an active season. Enter your opponent's score to update the standings.
If you win 10 holes and your opponent wins 8, you win the round — total score is ignored.

YOUR LEAGUE

Bring the gang in.

A rivalry is only as fun as the names on it. Invite your group — they'll land straight in your FGL season.

Rivals

STATS · BUILDING YOUR GAME PROFILE

Fairway needs a few rounds to crunch your numbers.

Once you start logging rounds, this page will show how your game evolves over time:
handicap progression, score distribution, course-by-course performance, and head-to-head matchups against every friend you play with.

Your rounds won't just be scores.
They'll become a career.
EXAMPLE
HCP progression
Track every differential over time. See how your game evolves season by season.
EXAMPLE
Score distribution
See where most of your rounds land — and which scores are getting more common.
EXAMPLE
Stats by course
Best round, avg differential, total rounds — for every course you've ever played.
EXAMPLE
Head-to-head
Side-by-side comparison with any friend — wins, losses, ties, course breakdowns.

HCP progression (all rounds)

Score distribution

Stats by course

CourseRoundsAvg BestAvg diff.Best diff.

Head-to-head

Hole-by-hole (avg vs par)

Requires rounds logged with per-hole scores.

Minigame record

Log a minigame (Golfmini, Minigame, or Other) to see your record by game and opponent.

LANGUAGE

Choose your language

Picks one of the world's main languages. The whole app updates instantly.

Language

⚠️ Translation is currently in progress. Header, tabs and welcome screen are fully translated. Most other UI is in English while we build out translations.

Quick actions

Profile

GolfCourseAPI (online course search)

Pull CR/Slope automatically from ~30,000 courses worldwide. Create a free account at golfcourseapi.com and paste your API key here. The key is stored locally in your browser only.

Default: https://api.golfcourseapi.com (often CORS-blocked).
With local proxy: http://localhost:8765
💡 Getting "Failed to fetch" or CORS errors? Run the bundled golf-proxy.py in a terminal and set Base URL to http://localhost:8765.

Export and import

All data is stored locally in your browser. Export to JSON for backup or moving to another machine.

🤝 Community courses: Export the courses you've contributed as a .json file. Send to a friend who can import them, or share on Discord/Reddit for the whole Fairway Golf League community.

About WHS calculations

Score Differential = (113 / Slope) × (Score − Course Rating). A lower differential = better round.

Handicap Index = average of the 8 best differentials from your last 20 rounds. With fewer rounds, the WHS ladder applies: 3 rounds → lowest − 2.0, 4 → lowest − 1.0, 5 → lowest, and so on up to 20+ rounds.

Course Handicap = HCP Index × (Slope/113) + (CR − Par), rounded.

This dashboard uses gross score directly. For fully accurate WHS calculation, scores should be adjusted to Net Double Bogey per hole — this is done automatically when you log hole-by-hole.

Let a friend watch live or co-sign the score
SPECTATOR MODE

Bring a witness

A spectator gets the live scoreboard on their phone — no friction, just open the link. If you and your opponent both add the round through Match Mode, both must confirm the result before it counts toward the FGL Season.

Waiting for spectator to join…
When they open the link, you'll see them here.
How co-signing works ▾
Two-person matches push the final result to both players' phones via Supabase Realtime. Each player taps Confirm — only then is the round saved to the FGL table. A solo logger can still finalize alone, but the result is marked unconfirmed on the table.
F
Install Fairway Golf League
Get the full-screen app on your home screen.

Add Fairway Golf League to your Home Screen

iOS doesn't support one-tap install — but it only takes 3 seconds.

1
Tap the Share button
↑
2
Scroll and tap Add to Home Screen
＋
3
Tap Add — you're done.
✓
A new version is ready
